data.title: Budget Tracker
data.statement:
A student is saving up money for a new game by tracking their finances over 7 days. (Monday to Sunday).
Calculate the total allowance, total expenses, and weekly savings.

<<Note:>> This problem uses basic arithmetic, just sum the values and find the difference.

testCases.title: Standard Values
testCases.testOut:
Total Allowance: 4250
Total Expenses: 2850
Weekly Savings: 1400

testCases.title: Positive Weekly Savings
testCases.testOut:
Total Allowance: 3820
Total Expenses: 2260
Weekly Savings: 1560

testCases.testOut:

Total Expenses: 900
Weekly Savings: 0

Weekly Savings: 0

Total Allowance: 0
Total Expenses: 0
Weekly Savings: 0

testCases.testOut:

Total Expenses: 94
Weekly Savings: -28

testCases.title: Overspent
testCases.testOut:

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

A student is saving up money for a new game by tracking their finances over 7 days. (Monday to Sunday).
Calculate the total allowance, total expenses, and weekly savings.

Note: This problem uses basic arithmetic, just sum the values and find the difference.
Input
First 7 lines: An integer allowance for each day of the week (Monday to Sunday).
Next 7 lines: An integer expense for each day of the week (Monday to Sunday).
Output
Line 1: Total Allowance: followed by the total of the daily allowances.
Line 2: Total Expenses: followed by the total of the daily expenses.
Line 3: Weekly Savings: followed by the total of the weekly savings.
Constraints
0 ≤ allowance ≤ 1000
0 ≤ expense ≤ 1000
Example
Input
500
600
450
550
700
800
650
300
400
250
350
500
600
450
Output
Total Allowance: 4250
Total Expenses: 2850
Weekly Savings: 1400
